text:
いやん！　ありがとっ！
やりきってくれたのね。感激だわぁ。

それじゃ……これをあげる。
たくさん集めたら素敵なモノと
交換してあげちゃうんだから。

あら、別のご褒美が良かった？
うふふ、そんな顔しないで。
まだお

Oh! Yes! Thank you! You really came through
for me. How sweet...

Here, this is for you. I've gathered plenty of
lovely things to trade you for your work.

Oh, were you hoping for a different kind of
payment? Heh, turn that frown upside-down.
There's still more to come.
